$comment: Maps repo doc paths to Slite note IDs for the GitHub <-> Slite sync. 'channel' = the Slite channel the tree lives in; 'root' = the space/folder the tree hangs under; 'folders' = git pathspec -> Slite folder-note id (scan scope for sync-detect.sh AND the create target for new docs under that path); 'docs' = repo file path -> Slite note id. NOTE: the two root-level markdown files are tracked via explicit per-file pathspec keys (source1.md / source2.md) pointing at the root note, so the detector scans them without over-matching SYNC.md/.sync/. A brand-new root-level .md would need its own folders entry to be auto-detected.
